name: Ming

skills.name: Good Omens
skills.description: Every 5s, Ming's next Basic Attack deals more magical damage and heals himself and the linked teammate. The healing is reduced if the enemy is nota hero.

skills.name: Time - Carefree
skills.description: Forms a link with the target. When linked to an ally, increases the Physical and Magical Attack Movement Speed, and Attack Speed of both parties. When linked to an enemy unit, reduces their Physical and Magical Attack while dealing damage over time.

skills.name: Mastery - Glide
skills.description: Switches the effect of the link. When linked to an ally, increases the Physical and Magical Defense of both parties. When linked to an enemy unit, reduces their Physical and Magical Defense. The effect can beswitched repeatedly.

skills.name: Peace - Longevity
skills.description: While linked, can spend own Health to restore an equal amount of Health toallies or deal an equal amount of damage to enemies. Recovers Health continuously while out of combat.

tips: Ming (Support): Tier B on international ranked — 49.93% WR.

faqs.question: Is Ming good in current season?
faqs.answer: Ming is Tier B Support with 49.93% win rate, 0.47% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Knowledge Gem, Boots of Resistance, Crimson Shadow, Crimson Shadow - Redemption, Dawnlight, Holy Grail. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.
